productDisplayName: Maxima Men White Dial Ssteele Watch
description: Style Note Want to steal the show? Want to break off from the mundane? Want to set a trend? Want to stand out from the crowd? Now here's your chance to make a slick style statement with this SSteele watch from maxima - this is the time-piece you've been waiting for to pep-up your accessory collection! Product Details Case style: Round stainless steel case Dial style: White dial with numerical indicies and silver and white hands Features: Date aperture between 4 and 5 hour marks Strap stype: Black rubber strap with tang clasp Water resistant to 3ATM, suitable for light rain or splashes Warranty: 1 Year Size: Case diameter: 44 mm Case thickness: 9 mm
